================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 CD AC 30 0C 9A
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x4C
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 20

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x4C
PayloadLen   : 20

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
85 EB D1 3E 85 EB D1 3E 85 EB D1 3E EE 02 0A 00 
00 00 00 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
85 EB D1 3E 85 EB D1 3E 85 EB D1 3E EE 02 0A 00 
00 00 00 00 

[BINARY DATA]
